title: Musical Foxes
body:
- This Forge mod allows foxes to play goat horn sounds instead of their regular sounds if they are holding one.
- Screeching is replaced by goat horn sound at 2x volume and snoring is replaced by goat horn sound at 15% volume.
- They hold the horns in a special way compared to other items.
- This mod can be configured to work with other mods that add items that extend **InstrumentItem** by adding them to the item tag **musicalfoxes:fox_can_play**.
